title: Promoter-associated histone-mark differential enrichment across serially stimulated CAR T-cells

sample_info.sample_type: CD8 and CD4 CAR T-cell chromatin profiling samples across serial stimulation timepoints

analytical_questions.primary_question: How do promoter-associated H3K4me2 and H3K27me3 enrichment patterns change in CD8 and CD4 CAR T-cells after repeated stimulation?
other_questions: Which promoter-associated genes change in CD8 CAR T-cells after extensive rechallenge from 0x to 9x stimulation?
Which promoter-associated genes differ between product CD8 CAR T-cells and CD8 CAR T-cells that lose expansion capacity after 3x stimulation?
Do rechallenged CD8 CAR T-cells differ between early and later expansion states from 3x to 6x stimulation?
Are CD8 CAR T-cell 0x versus 6x and 3x versus 6x results robust after excluding donor sRCHDO2?
Which promoter-associated genes change in CD4 CAR T-cells across 0x, 3x, and 6x stimulation comparisons?
Is chromatin remodelling more extensive in CD8 than CD4 CAR T-cells, and more pronounced for H3K4me2 than H3K27me3?

qc.qc_question: Are the input peak-by-sample data structures suitable for downstream analysis?
qc.qc_method: peak-by-sample matrix dimension check and duplicated-peak check

qc.qc_question: Are promoter-associated peaks defined consistently before gene-level analysis?
qc.qc_method: ChIPseeker annotation using TSS ±5 kb promoter regions

qc.qc_question: Are multiple peaks mapping to the same gene handled consistently?
qc.qc_method: sum promoter peak counts by annotated gene

qc.qc_question: Are comparisons restricted to the intended mark, cell type, and stimulation timepoints?
qc.qc_method: metadata filtering by histone mark, CD4/CD8 cell type, and 0x/3x/6x/9x timepoint

qc.qc_question: Are donor-sensitive CD8 comparisons checked for robustness?
Are significance and effect-size thresholds documented for interpretation?
qc.qc_method: volcano plots using adjusted p-value, raw p-value, and absolute log2 fold-change cutoff of 1.5

primary_methods: gene-level collapsing of promoter-associated peak counts
limma-voom modelling with timepoint as predictor
